llm: LLM enabled with model deepseek-reasoner from BASE_MODEL via OpenAI SDK.

candidate.name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm
candidate.strategy: Eliminate explicit transpose of B via CUBLAS_OP_T, reduce kernel launch overhead by replacing three ATen mm calls with three direct cuBLAS SGEMM calls (W@X, B.T@X, A*U) and accumulate low-rank contribution into Y with beta=1, expected speedup >1.1 for larger d.
